subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and we would definitely like to continue the conversation.

We have the following availability next week for a 30-minute call:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know your preferred time and we will set it up.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not able to share internal personnel contact information. I would recommend using the contact channels on our public website, and we can make sure the appropriate senior team members are brought into the discussion at the right stage.

Thanks again for following up, and looking forward to the meeting!

Best regards
